author: anon-a7c6025f
content: SIMD transmute approach has overhead from Arc/Mutex allocation per tensor, not from the kernel. The ferray-ufunc kernels themselves are fast but the framework wrapping (new TensorInner per operation) dominates at 1M elements. The MLP forward improved 3x (3320->1101us) because matmul dominates there. Committing current improvement — further optimization needs in-place tensor ops or arena allocation.
